view.title: Validate explicit UC need #4
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email opening is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 4 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for branching logic based on email opening is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for branching logic by confirming the presence of a condition step in the marketing campaign that checks if an email was opened. Specifically, the evidence shows a step with the key 'if_opened' that has a condition expression for the event 'opened', leading to different actions based on the outcome. This directly aligns with the requirement of executing 'do X' if the email is opened and 'do Y' if it is not.
